mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS hotDealId, h.title, h.description, h.starts_at AS startsAt, h.ends_at AS endsAt, ( SELECT pp.picture_saved_location FROM hot_deal_products hdp INNER JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hdp.product_option_id INNER JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.product_id = po.product_id WHERE hdp.hot_deal_id = h.id ORDER BY po.product_id, pp.display_order, pp.id FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY ) AS heroImageLocation FROM hot_deals h WHERE h.id = #{hotDealId} AND h.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(p.name, '^\[[^가-힣]*\][[:space:]]*', '') AS productName, c.name AS categoryName, hdp.original_price AS originalPrice, hdp.hot_deal_price AS hotDealPrice, CASE WHEN hdp.original_price = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((hdp.original_price - hdp.hot_deal_price) * 100 / hdp.original_price) END AS discountRate FROM hot_deal_products hdp INNER JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hdp.product_option_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE hdp.hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId} ORDER BY p.name, hdp.product_option_id
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO hot_deal_email_contents target USING ( SELECT #{hotDealId} AS hot_deal_id, #{subject} AS subject, #{content} AS content FROM dual ) source ON (target.hot_deal_id = source.hot_deal_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.subject = source.subject, target.content = source.content, target.validation_status = 'PENDING', target.validation_reason = NULL, target.validated_at = NULL, target.generated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, target.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (hot_deal_id, subject, content, generated_at) VALUES (source.hot_deal_id, source.subject, source.content, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE email_send_logs esl SET esl.title = #{subject}, esl.content = REPLACE( #{content}, '{{고객명}}', NVL((SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE u.id = esl.user_id), esl.recipient_email) ), esl.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE esl.hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId} AND esl.status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE hot_deal_email_contents SET validation_status = #{status}, validation_reason = #{reason}, validated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId}

UPDATE email_send_logs SET status = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PASS' THEN 'APPROVED' ELSE 'NEEDS_REVIEW' END, failure_reason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PASS' THEN NULL ELSE #{reason} END, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId} AND status = 'PENDING'
